meta.title: Soundz — Hearing Aids & Custom IEM | Tashkent
meta.description: Professional audiometry, hearing aids from world-leading brands, individual fitting and Custom In-Ear Monitors for musicians. Love your hearing — Soundz.

hero.title: Hear your world,
hero.lead: Professional hearing tests, world-leading hearing aids and custom stage monitors — all in one place.

paths.title: Which solution do you need?
paths.lead: A dedicated path for every need — from everyday life to the professional stage.

hearing.title: Hearing aids
hearing.text: From nearly invisible RIC to powerful BTE — matched to your lifestyle.

iem.title: Custom IEM
iem.text: Ear-molded monitors for musicians and stage professionals.

accessories.title: Accessories
accessories.text: Batteries, filters, drying boxes and Bluetooth accessories.

children.title: Children's hearing
children.text: Gentle testing and a dedicated fitting program for kids.

steps.title: The right diagnosis — before you buy.
steps.lead: You pay at the clinic, only once you're sure the device fits you.

items.title: Book an appointment
items.text: Pick a location and a convenient time online.

items.title: Choose your model
items.text: Based on results, budget and lifestyle.

items.title: Individual fitting
items.text: The device is tuned precisely to your hearing.

iem.title: Built for the stage. Molded for your ears.
iem.lead: Individually cast monitors from an impression of your ear — the choice of musicians, engineers and audiophiles.

features.title: Custom impression
features.text: A specialist takes your ear impression — the monitor fits only you.

features.title: Studio-grade sound
features.text: Accurate, rich sound on stage and in the studio.

features.title: Reliable isolation
features.text: Protection from outside noise — and for your hearing.

knowledge.title: Understand first, choose second.
knowledge.lead: Trusted articles on hearing health, prepared by specialists.

cards.title: Early signs of hearing loss
cards.text: When is it time to see a specialist?

cards.title: How to choose a hearing aid?
cards.text: A guide to form factors, technology levels and budget.

cards.title: Children's hearing
cards.text: For parents: signs, testing and the fitting journey.

booking.title: Pick a location and a time.
booking.lead: Once your request is saved, an operator will call to confirm the visit.

contact.title: A specialist will contact you.
contact.lead: Leave your phone number — we'll take it from there.
